allow: PowerShell(cd d:\\TFT_DIAS\\fe; Start-Process -FilePath "npx" -ArgumentList "vite","--port","5173" -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru | Select-Object Id; Start-Sleep 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/champions" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host \($r.Content | Select-String -Pattern "button" -AllMatches | Select-Object -First 3\) } catch { Write-Host "Cannot reach dev server: $_" })
